trades.reasoning: PTON has fallen off today's momentum screener entirely, signaling faded technical strength; rotating out frees ~$2,300 in cash needed to fill open portfolio slots
Score 90 with RSI 68 in the bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, and price well above SMA-20 — AI infrastructure demand remains structurally strong and technicals are clean

decisions.briefing: Markets edged slightly lower today (S&P -0.4%, NASDAQ -0.2%) in a listless, low-conviction session — neutral enough that I'm comfortable adding selective exposure. The main problem is we're sitting on only $28 cash despite having 4 open slots, so I'm rotating out of PTON (which dropped off the screener entirely) to unlock capital, then redeploying into NVDA which is the strongest large-cap momentum name on today's list. SMCI, our existing holding, also scores 90 today so I'm holding that with conviction.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest losses today with the S&P 500 down 0.4% and the NASDAQ off 0.2%, reflecting a cautious, directionless tone as investors weighed lingering uncertainty around trade policy and macro data. No single dominant headline drove the move — light selling across technology and consumer sectors was enough to nudge indices lower in thin trading. The muted decline suggests the market is consolidating recent gains rather than entering a fresh downtrend.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日小幅收跌，標普500下挫0.4%，那斯達克微跌0.2%，市場情緒審慎而缺乏明確方向。在貿易政策不確定性持續及宏觀數據消化期間，科技及消費類股的輕微賣壓足以拖累大盤走低。整體走勢偏向近期漲幅後的整理格局，尚未形成新一輪跌勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation means selling positions that have lost technical momentum and redeploying that capital into stocks showing stronger price trends and indicator signals. When a stock disappears from a momentum screener — like PTON today — it typically means buyers are stepping back and the edge that made it attractive is gone. Rotating into higher-momentum names keeps your portfolio aligned with where the market's energy is actually flowing.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出技術動能減弱的持倉，將資金轉投至趨勢更強、指標信號更佳的股票。當一檔股票從動能篩選名單中消失（如今日的PTON），通常意味著買盤正在退潮，原本的優勢已不復存在。透過輪動至更具動能的標的，可使投資組合持續跟隨市場資金流向，提升勝率。
